[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 1101001 4
2 0001000 1
3 1011010 4
4 0110001 3
5 0100101 3
6 1101001 4
7 1100001 3

01 10 1101101 5
12 21 1100111 5
23 32 1100111 5
34 43 1101101 5
45 54 1101001 4 match 1 6
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1011111 6
70 07 1111011 6

02 20 1101011 5
13 31 0100101 3 match 0 5
24 42 1101011 5
35 53 1100101 4
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 1110011 5
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 1010111 5

03 30 1101101 5
14 41 1101101 5
25 52 1100011 4
36 63 1111111 a
47 74 1111011 6
50 05 1101001 4 match 1 6
61 16 1011111 6
72 27 1110011 5

04 40 1101001 4 match 1 6
15 51 1100101 4
26 62 1111111 a
37 73 1110111 6
